description: Create and deploy a channel named 'ADT_Message_Relay' to act as a reliable TCP forwarding queue. The channel must receive HL7 v2.x messages via TCP/MLLP on port 6661 and forward them to a downstream system at localhost:6665 via TCP/MLLP. Configure destination queuing with 'Queue Messages' set to 'Always', a 'Retry Interval' of 10000ms, a 'Max Retry Count' of 5, and 'Rotate Queue' enabled. Verify the configuration by sending the sample ADT message located at /home/ga/test_adt_a01.hl7 to the source port.
